@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam noteBackgroundColor Red

skinparam noteFontSize 14
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteTextAlignment left
skinparam notePadding 10
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteShape rectangle
skinparam noteStereotypePosition top
skinparam noteTextAlignment left
skinparam noteTextPadding 5
skinparam noteTextPosition center
skinparam noteTextWrap true
skinparam noteWidth 200
skinparam noteHeight 50
skinparam noteMargin 5
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteBorderLineStyle solid
skinparam noteBorderLineColor Red
skinparam noteBackgroundColor Red
skinparam noteFontColor Black
skinparam noteFontName Courier
skinparam noteFontSize 14
skinparam noteFontStyle plain

skinparam noteWidth 200

skinparam noteWidth 200
skinparam noteHeight 50

class Dummy {
}
class Foo {
}
class Foo2 {
}

Dummy --> Foo : A link
note right of Dummy: note that is red
Dummy --> Foo2 : Another link
note right of Foo2: this is my note on right link\nand in blue
@enduml
